air_temperature.Germany_DE-HoH: Tair50HMP (HMP45, 49m) -> airTemp_mean_degC; daily mean; degC; fallback Tair45HMP
air_temperature.Hohes-Holz: Tair14PT (Pt100, 14.2m) -> airTemp_mean_degC; daily mean; degC; fallback Tair50HMP
air_temperature.Donana_HIDROMET: TA_X (daily mean, sensor height from data) -> airTemp_mean_degC; degC
air_temperature.Rosalia: air temperature column (Vaisala HMP, 2.0m) -> airTemp_mean_degC; daily mean; degC

precipitation.FI_Hyytiala: Precipacc_GPM (OTT Pluvio, 1.5m) daily diff -> precip_tot_mm; mm; fallback Precip tipping bucket
precipitation.Germany_DE-HoH: precip50 (tipping bucket, 50m) daily sum -> precip_tot_mm; mm
precipitation.Rosalia: precipitation column (tipping bucket, 1.5m) daily sum -> precip_tot_mm; mm

soil_moisture.FI_Hyytiala: VALUE where VARIABLE='soil water content', VERT_OFFSET=-4.0cm -> sws_mean_percent

soil_temperature.FI_Hyytiala: VALUE where VARIABLE='soil water temperature', VERT_OFFSET=-3.5cm -> soilTemp_Mean_degC

soil_texture.Germany_DE-HoH: SOGEO clay/sand/silt proportions (%) with depth ranges
